title: Create config module with dataclasses and loader
description: Create src/codex_orchestrator/config.py with three frozen dataclasses (SchedulerConfig, BackendConfig, OrchestratorConfig) and two public functions (load_config, default_config). SchedulerConfig holds lease_timeout_minutes (30), max_corrective_attempts (2), followup_suffixes ({tester: test, documentation: docs, review: review}), corrective_suffix ('corrective'), and transient_block_patterns (tuple of 10 patterns matching scheduler.py lines 37-48). BackendConfig holds binary, skills_dir, flags, allowed_tools_default, allowed_tools_by_agent. OrchestratorConfig holds default_runner ('codex'), templates_dir ('templates/agents'), agent_types list, scheduler (SchedulerConfig), and backends dict. OrchestratorConfig exposes backend(name) returning BackendConfig or raising KeyError, and allowed_tools_for(backend, agent_type) returning deduplicated union of default + per-agent tools. load_config(root: Path) reads .orchestrator/config.yaml via pyyaml, falls back to default_config() if file missing, raises on malformed YAML. default_config() returns defaults matching all current hardcoded values: codex backend has binary='codex', skills_dir='.agents', flags=['--skip-git-repo-check','--full-auto','--color','never'], empty tool lists; claude backend has binary='claude', skills_dir='.claude', flags=['--dangerously-skip-permissions'], allowed_tools_default with 10 tools (Edit,Write,Read,Bash,Glob,Grep,Skill,ToolSearch,WebSearch,WebFetch), and allowed_tools_by_agent with developer getting [Agent,NotebookEdit,TaskCreate,TaskUpdate,TaskGet,TaskList], tester getting [Agent,TaskCreate,TaskUpdate,TaskGet,TaskList], planner and review getting [], documentation getting [NotebookEdit]. All dataclasses must be frozen (immutable).
acceptance_criteria: SchedulerConfig, BackendConfig, OrchestratorConfig are frozen dataclasses
default_config() returns values identical to current hardcoded constants in runner.py, scheduler.py, prompts.py, skills.py, cli.py
load_config(root) returns default_config() when config file is missing
backend('codex') and backend('claude') return correct BackendConfig
backend('nonexistent') raises KeyError with message listing valid backends
allowed_tools_for('claude', 'developer') returns merged default + developer tools, deduplicated
